name: harness-engineering
description: Agent-first software engineering workflow for Codex: planning, repo knowledge, verification loops, architecture guardrails, review loops, and cleanup systems.

interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin inspired by OpenAI's Harness Engineering article. It helps agents turn goals into executable plans, repository knowledge, verification loops, architecture constraints, review loops, and recurring cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Create AGENTS.md, architecture docs, plans, and checks.
Diagnose why Codex keeps failing and improve the harness.
